svg.text: Problem: find min (or max) x such that some property p(x) holds.
Property must be monotone: if p(x) is true, then p(x + 1), p(x + 2), ... are also true.
(Or: p(x) false implies p(x - 1), p(x - 2), ... false.)
Binary-search x over [lo, hi]; at each mid, run a feasibility check (often O(n)).
• Koko Eating Bananas — min eat-rate so all bananas finish in h hours
• 410. Split Array Largest Sum — partition into k subarrays minimising the max sum
• 875. Capacity to Ship Packages in D Days — min ship capacity
• 668. Kth Smallest Number in Multiplication Table
• 778. Swim in Rising Water — min t such that path exists at heights ≤ t
• 1011. Capacity to Ship in D Days, 1283. Find Smallest Divisor
Recognition: "min/max value such that..." with a feasibility check ⟹ binary-search the answer.
